subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This servant of Thine beareth the name of his illustrious grandfather who attained unto the splendorous rays of Thy bounties on a day of tribulation, and who hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک هذا سمی جده الجلیل الذی فاز بانوار الطافک فی یوم عسیر و سمع
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
